query: List the five 1 km grid cells in Lillestrøm municipality with the highest number of parcels located in quick-clay hazard areas, sorted by parcel count descending.

1.description: get municipality geometry by name using ILIKE to avoid exact-match issues

2.description: get quick-clay hazard areas filtered by municipality geometry using spatial intersection

3.description: get parcels filtered by municipality geometry and intersecting quick-clay hazard areas

4.description: get 1 km grid cells filtered by municipality geometry

5.description: assign parcels to grid cells using spatial intersection

7.description: sort grid cells by parcel count descending
